name: Sour Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs.
2. Add sugar and beat until light.
3. Whip sour cream and fold into egg mixture.
4. Add raisins, nutmeg, salt, and lemon juice. Mix thoroughly.
5. Pour the mixture into the pie shell.
6. Bake at 450 degrees for 10 minutes.
7. Reduce heat to 350 degrees and continue baking for 20 minutes.
